description_long: This is a deep green, Chesterfield-style sofa with a classic, luxurious appearance. The sofa features a fully tufted seat, backrest, and armrests, with deep button detailing that creates a diamond pattern across all cushioned surfaces. The armrests are rolled and extend outward at the same height as the backrest, giving the sofa a symmetrical and inviting look. The back and sides are smoothly upholstered, with no visible seams or breaks, and the sofa sits low to the ground with its legs either hidden or recessed. The glossy finish of the upholstery suggests a leather or faux leather material, contributing to its elegant and slightly reflective surface. This piece would be well-suited for upscale urban environments such as hotel lobbies, stylish waiting areas, or chic outdoor lounges.
description: A deep green, glossy Chesterfield-style sofa with tufted cushions, rolled armrests, and a luxurious, classic design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width, deep button-tufted seat, backrest, and rolled armrests.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the rounded, rolled armrest and the depth of the tufted seat.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth, continuous back with no visible seams or tufting.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring the rolled armrest and deep seat profile.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Single, continuous seat cushion and backrest, both fully attached and deeply button-tufted in a uniform diamond pattern.
attribute_armrest_style: Present, rolled armrests at the same height as the backrest, fully upholstered and tufted, with a rounded profile and plush padding.
attribute_leg_design: Legs are not visible, suggesting a hidden or recessed base design, possibly with short block feet or a platform base.
attribute_backrest_type: Continuous, medium-height backrest with a curved profile, fully attached and deeply button-tufted, matching the armrest height.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid dark green color with a glossy finish and a prominent diamond-patterned tufted texture across all cushioned surfaces.
